guards.guard: grade A/B/C assigned + AVL gate applied
within band: amend to actual count
full line or accepted partial block
critical NCR / 2 consecutive below / failed audit / expired cert / sanctions / active CAPA
base or null: return unchanged, no call
0 / NaN / Inf / negative -> log, return original
